channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-16968] conf-sanity test_32c: FAIL: Mounting the MDT
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for eaujames <eaujames@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/834cd680-cff2-46fa-9757-48c44b6c2209

test_32c failed with the following error:

test_32c failed with 1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/96260 - 4.18.0-477.10.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/96260 - 4.18.0-477.10.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

MDT's dmesg

[ 7861.735458] loop0: detected capacity change from 0 to 204800000
[ 7861.769950] LDISKFS-fs (loop0): mounted filesystem with ordered data mode. Opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro,no_mbcache,nodelalloc
[ 7861.771862] Lustre: t32fs-MDT0000-osd: enabled 'large_dir' feature on device /dev/loop0
[ 7861.773151] Lustre: Skipped 1 previous similar message
[ 7861.774719] Lustre: 426876:0:(scrub.c:191:scrub_file_load()) t32fs-MDT0000: reset scrub OI count for format change (LU-16655)
[ 7861.776525] Lustre: 426876:0:(scrub.c:191:scrub_file_load()) Skipped 1 previous similar message
[ 7861.859226] Lustre: MGS: Logs for fs t32fs were removed by user request.  All servers must be restarted in order to regenerate the logs: rc = 0
[ 7861.963212] Lustre: 426922:0:(tgt_lastrcvd.c:2196:tgt_reply_data_init()) t32fs-MDT0000: reply_data v1 will be upgraded to new record size
[ 7862.029432] Lustre: t32fs-MDT0000: Imperative Recovery not enabled, recovery window 60-180
[ 7862.030797] Lustre: Skipped 2 previous similar messages
[ 7862.510495] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -o mgsnode=10.240.26.139@tcp,loop,writeconf /tmp/t32/mdt2 /tmp/t32/mnt/mdt1
[ 7862.794369] loop1: detected capacity change from 0 to 204800000
[ 7862.817797] LustreError: 427045:0:(osd_handler.c:8220:osd_mount()) t32fs-MDT0001-osd: can't mount /dev/loop1: -16
[ 7862.819530] LustreError: 427045:0:(obd_config.c:775:class_setup()) setup t32fs-MDT0001-osd failed (-16)
[ 7862.821042] LustreError: 427045:0:(obd_mount.c:210:lustre_start_simple()) t32fs-MDT0001-osd setup error -16
[ 7862.822623] LustreError: 427045:0:(tgt_mount.c:2106:server_fill_super()) Unable to start osd on /dev/loop1: -16
[ 7862.824236] LustreError: 427045:0:(super25.c:188:lustre_fill_super()) llite: Unable to mount <unknown>: rc = -16
[ 7863.116947] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: losetup -a
[ 7863.784425] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  conf-sanity test_32c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the MDT 
[ 7864.127598] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: conf-sanity test_32c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the MDT

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_32c - test_32c failed with 1
item.summary: conf-sanity test_32c: FAIL: Mounting the MDT

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
+1 on master with OST: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/594a1656-0b7d-4cc9-874f-52e522614065

[ 6066.759154] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mount -t lustre -onomgs -oloop,mgsnode=10.240.45.51@tcp,writeconf /tmp/t32/ost /tmp/t32/mnt/ost
[ 6066.918315] loop2: detected capacity change from 0 to 204800000
[ 6066.949890] LustreError: 389916:0:(osd_handler.c:8414:osd_mount()) t32fs-OST0000-osd: can't mount /dev/loop2: -16
[ 6066.951861] LustreError: 389916:0:(obd_config.c:781:class_setup()) setup t32fs-OST0000-osd failed (-16)
[ 6066.953560] LustreError: 389916:0:(obd_mount.c:213:lustre_start_simple()) t32fs-OST0000-osd setup error -16
[ 6066.955318] LustreError: 389916:0:(tgt_mount.c:2183:server_fill_super()) Unable to start osd on /dev/loop2: -16
[ 6066.957173] LustreError: 389916:0:(super25.c:188:lustre_fill_super()) llite: Unable to mount <unknown>: rc = -16
[ 6067.261995] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  conf-sanity test_32c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the OST 
[ 6067.491757] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: conf-sanity test_32c: @@@@@@ FAIL: Mounting the OST
[ 6067.777126] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-01-12/lustre-reviews_review-dne-part-3_101290_5_d733c17d-582e-4a30-8501-cb092ae1c681//conf-sanity.test_32c.debug_log.$(hostname -s).1705090849.log;
               		dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-01-12/lustre-reviews_revi
